title: hydrocotyle vulgaris
intro: Hydrocotyle vulgaris, also known as pennywort, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Europe and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of pennywort include its potential to improve cognitive function, reduce stress and anxiety, and support liver health, as well as its use in treating various skin conditions and wounds. Pennywort can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and it is also used in traditional skincare products, such as creams and ointments.
